sprint_round.text: What is the value of 2 + (2 × 2) + (2 × 2 × 2)?

The value of a word is the sum of the values of all letters in the word. The value of each vowel (A, E, I, O, U) is 8 and the value of each consonant is 5, so the value of the word HAPPY is 5 + 8 + 5 + 5 + 5 = 28. What is the value of the word MATHCOUNTS?
What value of x satisfies x × y = 36, if y = 12?
The fair spinner shown is divided into five equal sections. What is the probability that the spinner will land on a multiple of 6? Express your answer as a common fraction.
Ed is two years older than Al. Ben is five years younger than Al. How many years older than Ben is Ed?
If (12 − ♥)/3 = 1, what is the value of ♥?
A rectangle has a width of 10 cm and a length of 15 cm. If each side is doubled in length, what is the area of the new rectangle?
If Andrea randomly chooses two distinct elements from the set {1, 2, 3, 4}, what is the sum of the least possible and greatest possible products?
A sphere is inscribed in a cube with an edge length of 6 cm. What is the volume of this sphere if V = (4/3)πr^3? Express your answer in terms of π.
If the arithmetic mean of 15, 7, 12, 5 and x is 10, then what is the value of x?
This rectangular prism has integer edge lengths, and the three distinct faces of the prism have areas 35 in^2, 45 in^2 and 63 in^2. What is the volume of the prism?
If only nickels, dimes and quarters are available, how many different ways are there to choose a combination of coins totaling 30 cents?

In a bag, there are 12 purple, 7 green, 11 blue and 3 pink marbles. If you select two marbles at random from the bag, without replacement, what is the probability that you will choose first a pink marble and then a purple marble? Express your answer as a common fraction.

A water tank in the shape of a rectangular prism has dimensions of 10 feet by 3 feet by 2 feet and is oriented with the top and bottom surfaces being level. At 11:00 a.m., the water level is at 70% of the tank’s height. The water begins draining from the bottom of the tank at a constant rate. At noon the water level is down to 40% of the tank’s height. At 1:00 p.m., how many cubic feet of water are left in the tank?
The prime factorization of 2025 can be written in the form a^b × c^d. What is the sum of a + b + c + d?

The average of ten numbers is 9.5. If 1 is added to the first number, 2 is added to the second, 3 is added to the third and so on until 10 is added to the tenth, what is the average of the 10 new numbers?
If m and n are positive integers such that m^n = 64, what is the sum of all possible values of m + n?

Atem has 5 different sized matchsticks whose lengths are positive integer number of centimeters. No three can be arranged to form the sides of a triangle. What is the least possible sum of the lengths of all Atem’s matchsticks?
Suppose x is a real number such that 2^x = x + 3. What is the value of (2^(x+3))/(x + 3)?
When √(6 + 2√5) is written in simplest radical form as a + √b, where a and b are positive integers, what is the value of a + b?
How many ordered pairs of positive integers (m, n) are there with n ≤ 10 and where 2/3 ≤ m/n < 1?
How many ordered triples of odd positive integers (a, b, c) are there for which a + b + c = 49 and a < b < c?
Let 2^n be the greatest power of 2 that divides: 1×2×3×4 + 2×3×4×5 + 3×4×5×6 + ⋯ + 25×26×27×28. What is n?
What is the first non-zero digit of 7^(5/2) that appears after the decimal point?
How many ordered pairs of positive integers (a, b) satisfy 7ab/(a + b) = 2025?

Tetrahedron ABCD with volume 2025 cm^3 has segment BD perpendicular to plane ABC. Suppose that angle ABC = 90 degrees, angle DAB = 30 degrees and angle DCB = 60 degrees. What is BD? Express your answer in simplest radical form.
